title: Add Tasks
description: Add Twitter user tweets scraping tasks by screen name

content.introduction: Add Twitter users to scrape tweets from by providing their screen names (usernames). The scraper will retrieve tweets from the specified user's timeline.

rows.description: Hash of your squid configured with the Twitter User Tweets Scraper
Array of task objects, each containing a `screen_name` field

proTips.content: You can add multiple screen names in a single request to scrape tweets from several users at once.
The screen_name should not include the @ symbol - use `elonmusk` not `@elonmusk`.

seo.title: Add Tasks - Twitter User Tweets Scraper - Lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add Twitter user tweets scraping tasks using the Lobstr.io API.
